# crossmem

> crossmem is a portable, offline-first knowledge database for MCP-capable AI
> coding CLIs. A single SQLite file backs hybrid (FTS5 + vector) search across
> twelve supported clients, with no cloud dependency and no vendor lock-in.

## Installation

The files below are LLM-addressed install guides — one per supported CLI.
Each guide is idempotent and ends with a `crossmem doctor` self-check plus
an MCP round-trip.

- [Amazon Q CLI](install/amazonq.md)
- [Claude Code](install/claude_code.md)
- [Cline](install/cline.md)
- [Continue.dev](install/continuedev.md)
- [Cursor](install/cursor.md)
- [Gemini CLI](install/gemini.md)
- [Goose](install/goose.md)
- [Kilo Code](install/kilocode.md)
- [OpenCode](install/opencode.md)
- [Pi](install/pi.md)
- [Windsurf](install/windsurf.md)
- [Zed](install/zed.md)

## Concepts

- [Project overview and architecture](CLAUDE.md)
- [Install guide index](install/README.md)
- [Per-CLI install guide schema](install/_template.md)
